message.content:
搜索以下关键词（通过 web search 搜索 GitHub 仓库），寻找适合"B2B客户跟进管理"的开源项目：

搜索方向：
1. "crm customer follow-up system" - 客户跟进CRM系统
2. "AI customer conversation analysis" - AI驱动客户对话分析
3. "customer relationship management open source" - 开源CRM
4. "sales pipeline management tool" - 销售管道管理
5. "conversation intelligence platform" - 对话智能平台
6. "CRM with email integration open source" - 集成邮件的CRM
7. "crm playwright scraper export" - 带有数据抓取功能的CRM

特别关注：
- 是否支持多渠道（邮件+聊天）数据整合
- 是否有AI分析/回复建议功能
- 是否支持客户分类和优先级管理
- 是否易于本地部署
- 是否有Python/Node.js API
- 是否支持webhook/自动化

列出最相关的3-5个项目，给出仓库地址、星数、核心能力和适用场景评价。

content.content:
Web search results for query: "GitHub CRM with email integration multi-channel customer management 2024 2025"

I'll search for GitHub CRM projects with email integration and multi-channel customer management features.

Links: [{"title":"GitHub - RealmKitAI/crm-realmkit: Complete AI-optimized CRM platform for modern sales teams - Customer relationship management with advanced analytics, pipeline management, and AI-powered insights · GitHub","url":"https://github.com/RealmKitAI/crm-realmkit"},{"title":"GitHub - BasaltHQ/crm-official: BasaltCRM: A high-performance, enterprise-grade CRM and outreach engine. Built on Next.js 16, TypeScript, Shadcn/ui, and Prisma. Features AI-powered lead discovery, intelligent ICP scoring, multi-channel communication (Voice/SMS/Email), and real-time business analytics.","url":"https://github.com/BasaltHQ/crm-official"},{"title":"GitHub - ahkamboh/ai-crm-system: An advanced Customer Relationship Management (CRM) system with multi-channel communication, role-based access, and AI-powered automation. Manage customer queries, track sales, and handle appointments efficiently, all in one platform. · GitHub","url":"https://github.com/ahkamboh/ai-crm-system"}]

Here are the top GitHub CRM projects with email integration and multi-channel customer management features found in the search:

---

### 1. **RealmKit CRM** (`RealmKitAI/crm-realmkit`)
- **Stack:** Next.js 14, TypeScript, Prisma, PostgreSQL
- **Email Integration:** Gmail, Outlook, Exchange sync
- **Multi-Channel:** Twilio SMS/Voice, calendar integration (Google Calendar, Outlook)
- **Key Features:** AI-powered insights, drag-and-drop sales pipeline, real-time collaboration, lead scoring, mobile-responsive
- **Setup:** One-command `docker-compose up` deployment

### 2. **BasaltCRM** (`BasaltHQ/crm-official`)
- **Stack:** Next.js 16, TypeScript, Shadcn/ui, Prisma, MongoDB
- **Email Integration:** Built-in email outreach via Resend
- **Multi-Channel:** Voice (AI-powered calls), SMS, Email outreach
- **Key Features:** AI-powered lead discovery, intelligent ICP scoring, real-time analytics, automated outreach workflows
- **Status:** Active development (v1.2.0 released Feb 2026)

### 3. **AI CRM System** (`ahkamboh/ai-crm-system`)
- **Stack:** Next.js 14, Express.js, Vercel Postgres, Tailwind CSS + Shadcn/ui
- **Email Integration:** Yes (part of unified communication)
- **Multi-Channel:** Instagram, WhatsApp, Facebook, chat platforms
- **Key Features:** AI-powered insights, role-based access (Admin/Manager/Agent), query management, appointment scheduling, sales pipeline
- **Updated:** November 2024

---

These three repos represent a range from fully featured enterprise-grade CRM (RealmKit, BasaltCRM) to a more focused multi-channel communication system (AI CRM System). All include both **email integration** and **multi-channel customer management** capabilities with modern tech stacks.

Here are the results for the search query **GitHub "customer follow-up system" CRM open source stars**:

### Top Open-Source CRM Projects on GitHub (with Stars)

| Project | Description | Stars | Stack |
|---------|------------|-------|-------|
| **Twenty** | Modern, Notion-inspired open-source CRM | ~44.8k ⭐ | TypeScript |
| **Krayin CRM** | Laravel-based CRM for SMEs & enterprises | ~22k ⭐ | PHP/Laravel + Vue.js |
| **SuiteCRM** | Enterprise-class open-source CRM | High (popular) | PHP |
| **EspoCRM** | SPA frontend CRM with REST API | Popular | PHP |
| **Frappe CRM** | Modern CRM built with Frappe framework | Growing | Python/Frappe |
| **ERPNext** | All-in-one ERP with robust CRM | Very popular | Python/Frappe |
| **PingCRM** | AI-powered personal CRM with follow-up suggestions | New (Show HN) | Python/FastAPI + Next.js |
| **Monica** | Personal relationship manager | Popular | PHP/Laravel |
| **OpenSCRM** | WeChat private traffic management system | ~1.3k ⭐ | Go + React |
| **DataTalk CRM** | AI-native CRM built on LLMs | 3 ⭐ (new) | AI-powered |
| **CeresCRM** | Lightweight CRM (Chinese, on Gitee) | New | Java/Spring |

### Key Observations

- **Twenty** is the most popular modern open-source CRM (~44.8k stars), inspired by Notion's UI/UX
- **Krayin CRM** (~22k stars) is a strong Laravel-based alternative to Salesforce
- **PingCRM** is a newer entrant specifically focused on **personal networking and follow-up automation** — it combines Gmail, Telegram, Twitter, and LinkedIn sync with AI-powered follow-up suggestions using Claude API
- For **customer follow-up systems**, PingCRM appears most directly relevant with its "relationship score" tracking and automated message drafting
- Many projects listed on [awesome-open-source-crm](https://github.com/sneg55/awesome-open-source-crm) provide a comprehensive comparison

Links: [{"title":"","url":"https://raw.githubusercontent.com/aws-samples/conversation-intelligence-using-aiml-on-aws/main/README.md"},{"title":"Conversation Intelligence: Gong.io AI Alternative","url":"https://www.activeloop.ai/resources/conversation-intelligence-gong-io-ai-alternative/"},{"title":"GitHub - jxnl/kura: Kura is a simple reproduction of the CLIO paper which uses language models to label user behaviour before clustering them based on embeddings recursively. This helps us understand user behaviour on a higher level without sacrificing PII. · GitHub","url":"https://github.com/jxnl/kura"},{"title":"GitHub - ReverendBayes/AI-Powered-Call-Center-Intelligence: Real-time behavioral intelligence for call centers. Transcribes support calls, redacts PII, extracts emotional tone, classifies issues, and delivers insight-rich dashboards — powered by GPT-3.5 (cheap tokens), Whisper, DuckDB, and a polished React+TypeScript frontend. No Azure. No Power BI. No vendor lock-in. Just full-stack AI that runs local. · GitHub","url":"https://github.com/ReverendBayes/AI-Powered-Call-Center-Intelligence"},{"title":"GitHub - sebg/dialectic: Open-source AI panel research tool for investigating opinions and insights.","url":"https://github.com/sebg/dialectic"},{"title":"Show HN: Open-Source Conversational Analytics","url":"https://hn.svelte.dev/item/43718886"},{"title":"Show HN: Product Analytics for LLMs","url":"https://hn.svelte.dev/item/43729103"},{"title":"Discover Agentic: An Open-Source Conversational AI Framework on GitHub - Onegen","url":"https://www.onegen.ai/project/discover-agentic-an-open-source-conversational-ai-framework-on-github/"},{"title":"kura by jxnl","url":"https://www.sourcepulse.org/projects/2402352"},{"title":"Show HN: AI Chat Watch – analyze what AI say about brands","url":"https://hn.svelte.dev/item/45580355"}]

Here are the key results from the web search for **GitHub "conversation intelligence" open source platform AI customer analysis**:

### Notable Open-Source Projects Found:

1. **aws-samples/conversation-intelligence-using-aiml-on-aws**  
   → A comprehensive solution for processing audio calls, chat transcripts, and video. Uses open-source models (Pyannote Audio for diarization, Faster-Whisper for transcription) plus AWS AI services (Comprehend for sentiment/entities, Bedrock with Claude for summarization). Designed for customer support analysis, compliance monitoring, and agent coaching.

2. **jxnl/kura**  
   → An open-source library for analyzing chat/conversation data using LLMs. Inspired by Anthropic's CLIO paper. Automatically clusters conversations to reveal user patterns, pain points, and feature requests. Privacy-first design. Designed for product teams, customer success, and AI/ML teams. MIT license.

3. **ReverendBayes/AI-Powered-Call-Center-Intelligence**  
   → A full-stack, local-first behavioral intelligence engine for call centers. Transcribes with Whisper, redacts PII, extracts emotional tone, classifies issues, recommends next-best-offer actions. Integrates with a churn predictor model (~95% accuracy). No cloud vendor lock-in.

4. **sebg/dialectic**  
   → An open-source AI panel research tool that simulates conversations between AI personas (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google) to surface diverse perspectives. Useful for customer/opinion research.

5. **Conversational Analytics (Show HN)**  
   → A library for bringing product analytics to conversational AI. Analyzes transcripts, auto-generates event schemas, tags messages, and sends events to Amplitude/PostHog. Designed to understand user behavior patterns in LLM-powered products.

### Summary
The most relevant projects for an **open-source conversation intelligence platform focused on AI customer analysis** are:
- **Kura** (closest match to "conversation intelligence" + "customer analysis" + open source on GitHub) – lightweight, Python-based, focuses on pattern discovery from chat data.
- **AWS Conversation Intelligence** – more enterprise-grade, full pipeline with transcription, diarization, and generative AI summarization.
- **AI-Powered Call Center Intelligence** – strong for real-time call center analytics with churn prediction.

Just a CLI and a FUSE-mounted filesystem. · GitHub","url":"https://github.com/dzhng/crm.cli"},{"title":"Deploy Krayin CRM | Free Open Source Salesforce Alternative","url":"https://railway.com/deploy/krayin"},{"title":"MCP Client CRM | Agency Management AI","url":"https://docs.gitscrum.com/en/mcp/clients"},{"title":"Twenty CRM Community node [Build in public] - Built with n8n - n8n Community","url":"https://community.n8n.io/t/twenty-crm-community-node-build-in-public/164692/3"}]

Here are the key results from the search for **GitHub open source CRM sales pipeline management tools** built with **Python** or **Node.js**:

---

### 1. PipelineRemind (Node.js + React)
- **GitHub:** [Pythagora-io/crmfordevs](https://github.com/Pythagora-io/crmfordevs?ref=producthunt)
- **Stack:** Node.js, Express, TypeScript, MongoDB, React, Tailwind CSS
- **Features:** Kanban board with drag-and-drop pipeline management, Gmail integration, Fireflies.ai meeting sync, automated email reminders, color-coded leads
- **Good for:** Personal/small-team sales pipeline with a visual Kanban interface

### 2. AI CRM System (Node.js + Next.js)
- **GitHub:** [ahkamboh/ai-crm-system](https://github.com/ahkamboh/ai-crm-system)
- **Stack:** Next.js 14, Node.js (Express), PostgreSQL, Tailwind CSS, OpenAI API
- **Features:** AI-powered insights & sales forecasting, multi-channel communication (Instagram, WhatsApp, Facebook), role-based access, appointment scheduling, sales pipeline tracking
- **Good for:** AI-driven CRM with multi-channel support

### 3. crm.cli (Node.js – CLI/Headless CRM)
- **GitHub:** [dzhng/crm.cli](https://github.com/dzhng/crm.cli)
- **Stack:** Node.js, SQLite, CLI-first (no UI)
- **Features:** Headless CRM with FUSE-mounted filesystem, pipe-friendly CLI, deep data normalization, fuzzy duplicate detection, agent/AI-ready
- **Good for:** Developers and AI agents who want a programmable, Unix-pipe-compatible CRM

### 4. Krayin CRM (PHP/Laravel – not Python/Node.js, but notable)
- **GitHub:** [krayin/laravel-crm](https://github.com/krayin/laravel-crm) (22k+ stars)
- **Stack:** Laravel (PHP), Vue.js, MySQL
- **Features:** Drag-and-drop Kanban pipeline, lead/contact management, email integration, workflow automation, AI lead extraction, REST API
- **Note:** PHP-based, but one of the most popular open-source CRM alternatives to Salesforce

### 5. Twenty CRM (TypeScript/Node.js – modern open-source CRM)
- **GitHub:** [twentyhq/twenty](https://github.com/twentyhq/twenty)
- **Stack:** TypeScript, Node.js, GraphQL, React
- **Features:** Modern, open-source CRM with GraphQL API, opportunities/pipeline management, people & company management, n8n community node integration
- **Good for:** Teams wanting a modern, customizable Salesforce alternative

---

**For Python-specific CRM tools**, you may also want to search separately for:
- **ERPNext** (Python/JS – full ERP with CRM module)
- **Odoo CRM** (Python – part of the Odoo ecosystem)
- **Saleor CRM** (Python/Django)

Here's a comprehensive summary of the findings from the web search:

---

## Top Open-Source CRM & Lead Scraping Projects on GitHub

### Full CRM Systems (with email/lead features)

1. **DjangoCRM** (`DjangoCRM/django-crm`) ⭐ ~1.5k+
   - **Stack:** Python / Django
   - **Features:** Lead management, deal tracking, **email marketing campaigns**, SMTP/IMAP email integration, email templates, contact segmentation, sales analytics
   - Great for self-hosted CRM with built-in mailing capabilities

2. **Krayin CRM** (`krayin-crm`) ⭐ ~8.8k+
   - **Stack:** Laravel (PHP) + Vue.js + Tailwind CSS
   - **Features:** Kanban lead view, email interaction tracking, contact management, custom fields, ACL, product management
   - One of the most popular open-source Laravel CRMs

3. **MassProspecting** (`MassProspecting`) - Multi-repo ecosystem
   - **Stack:** Ruby + various
   - **Features:** Lead scraping from Apollo.io, LinkedIn, Facebook, Gmail, email outreach campaign management
   - Includes `connectionsphere` (forked CRM) and `intercept` (AJAX/XHR scraping tool)

### Playwright/Scraping-Focused Projects

4. **CRM.Services.Scraping** (`CRMLXRMS-Labs/CRM.Services.Scraping`)
   - **Stack:** .NET 8.0 + Playwright + HtmlAgilityPack
   - **Features:** Static & dynamic content extraction, **Playwright for JS-heavy pages**, concurrent scraping, retry logic, extensible API
   - Published as NuGet package `CRMScraper.Library`

5. **Scrape-Emails-from-Websites** (`r7avi/Scrape-Emails-from-Websites`)
   - **Stack:** Python + Playwright
   - **Features:** Scrapes emails from home page & contact us page, CSV input/output, error logging

6. **DenchClaw** (`DenchHQ/DenchClaw`) - Local AI CRM
   - **Stack:** OpenClaw framework, AI-powered
   - **Features:** Natural language DB queries, LinkedIn & email automation, lead info completion, sales pipeline visualization, Google Drive/Notion/Slack/Salesforce/HubSpot integrations
   - Fully local, AI-driven outreach

### Lead Generation & Outreach Automation (from HuggingFace top-30 list)

7. **SalesGPT** (`filip-michalsky/SalesGPT`) ⭐ ~2.2k
   - Context-aware AI sales agent (voice, email, SMS, WhatsApp)

8. **theHarvester** (`laramies/theHarvester`) ⭐ ~12k
   - OSINT contact harvester - emails, names, domains from 20+ sources

9. **Google-Maps-Scraper** (`omkarcloud/google-maps-scraper`) ⭐ ~1.4k
   - Google Maps lead scraper with UI, extracts names, phones, emails

10. **Sales Outreach Automation** (`kaymen99/sales-outreach-automation-langgraph`)
    - LangGraph AI agents that research leads, scrape LinkedIn/company sites, and generate personalized outreach

---

### Top Recommendations by Use Case

| Use Case | Best Project |
|---|---|
| **Full CRM + email marketing** | DjangoCRM |
| **PHP/Laravel CRM** | Krayin CRM |
| **Playwright-based scraping library** | CRM.Services.Scraping (.NET) |
| **Email scraping from websites** | Scrape-Emails-from-Websites (Python) |
| **AI-powered local CRM + lead gen** | DenchClaw |
| **Multi-channel outreach automation** | MassProspecting ecosystem |
| **OSINT lead harvesting** | theHarvester |

- **Next.js 16** (Frontend)
- **TypeScript**
- **shadcn/ui** (UI components)
- **Prisma** (ORM)
- **MongoDB** (Database)
- **OpenAI API** (AI communications)

Here are the results for your search on the GitHub project **twentyhq/twenty** (Twenty CRM):

## Overview

**Twenty** is an open-source, modern CRM platform positioned as a community-powered alternative to Salesforce and other traditional CRM giants like HubSpot and Pipedrive.

## Key Stats (as of mid-2025)

- **GitHub Stars**: ~44.8K (and growing rapidly — one source mentions ~32.5K+ on another date, with daily gains of ~300+)
- **Forks**: ~6K
- **Primary Language**: TypeScript
- **License**: Other (custom open-source)
- **Latest Version**: 1.23.0
- **Active Contributors**: 300+
- **Backed by**: Y Combinator (team previously sold a startup to Airbnb)

## Core Features

- **100% Open Source & Self-Hosted** — Full data ownership, no vendor lock-in
- **Modern Tech Stack**: React, TypeScript, GraphQL (frontend); NestJS (backend); PostgreSQL (database)
- **Notion-Inspired UI** — Clean, intuitive interface with command palette (⌘K) navigation and visual pipeline management
- **Highly Customizable** — Custom objects/fields, flexible JSON fields, custom views/workflows
- **Developer-Friendly** — Comprehensive REST & GraphQL APIs, webhook support for real-time integrations
- **Enterprise-Ready Security** — GDPR-compliant, role-based access control (RBAC), SSO/SAML authentication, audit trails
- **Integrations** — Gmail & Outlook sync, Zapier (8,000+ apps), API-first architecture
- **Unlimited Users** (when self-hosted or via CloudStation at $17.99/month flat)

## What Sets It Apart

- **Composable Architecture** — Separate data models, business logic, and UI for maximum flexibility
- **Cost Savings** — Claimed to cut CRM costs by 94% vs. Salesforce ($100–330/user/month)
- **Community-Driven** — 300+ active contributors, transparent development

Twenty is described as an open-source CRM revolution, giving enterprises unprecedented flexibility, control, and scalability compared to traditional closed-source CRM solutions.

Here are the results of the web search for the GitHub repository **jxnl/kura**:

## Repository: jxnl/kura

- **Description**: Kura is an open-source library for analyzing unstructured chat data to uncover user behavior patterns, pain points, and feature requests — all without compromising PII. It's a reproduction of the **CLIO paper** that uses LLMs to label user behavior, then clusters them based on embeddings recursively.
- **Stars**: ~437–444 (as of the latest data)
- **License**: MIT
- **Created**: ~1 year ago
- **Last Commit**: ~6–7 months ago

### How It Works
1. Summarizes each conversation using a language model.
2. Clusters summaries semantically using **K-means**.
3. Recursively refines clusters into a hierarchy.
4. Reduces dimensionality using **HDBUMAP** for visualization.

### Key Features & Results
- Processes 10,000 conversations into ~20 clear patterns.
- Achieved a **40% reduction** in support volume for an e-commerce bot.
- Led to a **60% reduction** in confusing API queries for a developer documentation assistant.
- Increased **trial conversion by 18%** for a SaaS onboarding bot.

### Installation
```bash
pip install kura
```

### Notes
- The project is no longer actively maintained (last commit 7 months ago), but issues and PRs are still accepted.
- Designed for **batch processing** (not real-time analysis).
- Requires **Python 3.7+**.

The official GitHub URL is: **https://github.com/jxnl/kura**

## Repository: DjangoCRM/django-crm

**Stars:** **543** ⭐ (as of the latest data)

**Description:** Free open-source CRM and task management software with email marketing and many more features, built with Python and Django.

---

### Email Marketing Features

The repository includes a full **Mailing CRM & Email Marketing** module with:

- **Email accounts** (SMTP / IMAP support)
- **Email campaigns and newsletters**
- **Dynamic templates**
- **Email signatures**
- **Contact segmentation**
- **Built-in email client** with OAuth 2.0 support (Gmail, etc.)
- **Automatic email synchronization**
- **Ticket-style mechanism** linking correspondence to requests, leads, and deals

### Other Core Features

| CRM & Sales | Tasks & Collaboration | Email & Marketing |
|---|---|---|
| Lead management | CRM task manager | Mailing CRM |
| Deal tracking & forecasting | Projects & subtasks | Email marketing software |
| Company & contact management | Internal chat | CRM with email integration |
| Role-based access control | Reminders & files | SMTP / IMAP support |
| CRM analytics | Office memos | Email campaign automation |

### Additional Capabilities

- Web form integration with reCAPTCHA
- Excel import/export
- VoIP and messaging integration
- Localization support
- Self-hosted / on-premise deployment

---

The project has **404–543 stars** (depending on the source recency), **260 forks**, **511 commits**, and is considered **production/stable**, having been used in real business environments for many years.

Here are the search results for **GitHub "SalesGPT" filip-michalsky AI sales agent CRM stars**:

## Summary

**SalesGPT** by **Filip Michalsky** is a popular open-source, context-aware AI sales agent built on LLMs. It automates sales outreach across voice, email, SMS, WhatsApp, and other messaging channels.

## Key Stats

| Metric | Value |
|---|---|
| **GitHub Stars** | **~2,511** (as per latest data; earlier reports show ~2,046–2,200) |
| **Forks** | **564** |
| **License** | **MIT** |
| **Latest Release** | v0.1.2 (2024-03-25) |
| **Language** | Python (primary) |

## Key Features

- **Context-Aware Sales Conversations**: Understands and adapts to different sales funnel stages (Introduction → Qualification → Value Proposition → Needs Analysis → Solution Presentation → Objection Handling → Close → End Conversation).
- **Multi-Channel Support**: Voice, email, SMS, WhatsApp, WeChat, Telegram, etc.
- **Product Knowledge Base**: Reduces hallucinations by referencing actual business/product information.
- **LLM Agnostic**: Supports 50+ LLMs via LiteLLM integration (GPT-4, GPT-3.5, open-source models).
- **Action Tools**: Can generate Stripe payment links (close sales), schedule Calendly meetings, send automated emails, and connect to CRM/data systems via Mindware.
- **Low-Latency Voice**: <1s round-trip response for voice conversations (STT → LLM → TTS).
- **Human-in-the-Loop**: Optional supervision mode.
- **LangSmith Tracing**: For debugging and monitoring agent chains.

## Links

- **GitHub Repo**: [filip-michalsky/SalesGPT](https://github.com/filip-michalsky/SalesGPT)
- **PyPI**: `pip install salesgpt`
- **Docker**: Docker-compose provided for quick setup

content.text:
I now have comprehensive information. Here is the full report.

---

## B2B 客户跟进管理 -- 开源项目推荐报告

经过对 7 个方向的系统性搜索，以下是筛选出的最相关的 5 个项目，按推荐优先级排序：

---

### 1. Twenty CRM (twentyhq/twenty)

| 项目 | 信息 |
|---|---|
| **仓库地址** | https://github.com/twentyhq/twenty |
| **Star 数** | ~44,800 (增长极快) |
| **技术栈** | TypeScript, React, NestJS, GraphQL, PostgreSQL |
| **许可证** | 自定义开源 (AGPL-like) |
| **社区** | 300+ 贡献者, Y Combinator 孵化 |

**核心能力：**
- 现代化类 Notion 界面，CMD+K 命令面板，拖拽销售管道
- Gmail / Outlook 邮件双向同步
- REST + GraphQL 双 API，支持 Webhook
- 自定义对象/字段，灵活的视图和工作流
- RBAC 权限控制，SSO/SAML 身份认证
- n8n 社区节点集成，可联动 8000+ Zapier 应用

**B2B 客户跟进适用场景评价：**
这是目前最活跃的现代开源 CRM。**优势在于**漂亮的 UI、完善的邮件集成、GraphQL API 易于二次开发、支持 Webhook 做自动化。**不足是**目前内置 AI 分析能力有限（不自带对话分析），需要自行对接 AI 模型。适合需要"自建 Salesforce 替代品"的团队，尤其适合做邮件跟进管理和销售管道可视化。Docker 一键部署，本地化非常方便。

---

### 2. BasaltCRM (BasaltHQ/crm-official)

| 项目 | 信息 |
|---|---|
| **仓库地址** | https://github.com/BasaltHQ/crm-official |
| **Star 数** | 较新项目，星数正在增长中 |
| **技术栈** | Next.js 16, TypeScript, shadcn/ui, Prisma, MongoDB |
| **许可证** | 开源 (需确认具体协议) |

**核心能力：**
- **AI 驱动**：集成 OpenAI + DeepSeek + Anthropic 多模型
- **AI 线索发现** + ICP 评分（理想客户画像评分）
- **多渠道触达**：语音（网页内电话）、SMS、Email
- AI 生成沟通内容，智能自动化工作流
- SURGE AI 发票系统
- 实时业务分析面板

**B2B 客户跟进适用场景评价：**
这是目前**最能满足"AI + 多渠道"需求的项目**。内置 AI 对话/回复建议、线索评分、多渠道统一管理、自动化工作流，高度契合 B2B 客户跟进场景。基于 Next.js 16 和 MongoDB，Node.js 开发者友好。缺点是项目比较新，社区稳定性有待观察，文档可能不够完善。

---

### 3. DjangoCRM (DjangoCRM/django-crm)

| 项目 | 信息 |
|---|---|
| **仓库地址** | https://github.com/DjangoCRM/django-crm |
| **Star 数** | ~540 |
| **技术栈** | Python / Django, PostgreSQL / MySQL |
| **许可证** | 开源 (可商用) |

**核心能力：**
- 线索管理 + 交易追踪 + 销售漏斗
- **完整的邮件营销引擎**：SMTP/IMAP 支持，OAuth 2.0 (Gmail)，动态模板，邮件同步，自动标签
- 联系人分群 (segmentation)，邮件群发 (newsletter/campaign)
- 任务管理 + 项目管理 + 子任务
- 内部聊天/提醒/文件共享
- Excel 导入/导出，Web 表单集成 (reCAPTCHA)
- **生产级稳定性**，已在真实业务环境运行多年

**B2B 客户跟进适用场景评价：**
最适合**Python 团队**和**需要资深邮件营销能力的场景**。Django 生态成熟，易于通过 Django Admin 做二次开发、自定义数据模型。邮件模块非常完善（SMTP/IMAP 双向同步 + 自动化营销），且支持本地部署。缺点是 UI 没有 Twenty 现代，AI 能力基本为零（需自行集成）。适合偏传统的 B2B 跟进 + 邮件营销自动化需求。

---

### 4. SalesGPT (filip-michalsky/SalesGPT)

| 项目 | 信息 |
|---|---|
| **仓库地址** | https://github.com/filip-michalsky/SalesGPT |
| **Star 数** | ~2,500 |
| **技术栈** | Python, LangChain, LiteLLM, (任意 LLM) |
| **许可证** | MIT |

**核心能力：**
- **上下文感知的 AI 销售代理**：理解销售漏斗阶段（介绍 -> 资格 -> 价值主张 -> 需求分析 -> 方案演示 -> 异议处理 -> 关单）
- **多渠道支持**：语音 (<1s 延迟)、邮件、SMS、WhatsApp、WeChat、Telegram
- 支持 50+ 种 LLM（GPT-4/Claude/本地模型）
- 产品知识库对接（减少幻觉）
- 自动生成 Stripe 支付链接、Calendly 会议预约
- 可选人工介入 (Human-in-the-Loop)
- 支持 Docker 部署

**B2B 客户跟进适用场景评价：**
这**不是一个 CRM 系统**，而是一个**AI 销售代理引擎**。它可以作为 CRM 的 AI 能力层，嵌入到 Twenty 或 DjangoCRM 中。最擅长的是自动化的客户跟进对话（自动回复邮件/聊天），以及销售阶段推进。Python API 丰富，webhook 支持。MIT 协议友好。适合作为"对话智能"模块集成到现有 CRM 中。

---

### 5. Kura (jxnl/kura)

| 项目 | 信息 |
|---|---|
| **仓库地址** | https://github.com/jxnl/kura |
| **Star 数** | ~440 |
| **技术栈** | Python, LLM, Embedding, K-means 聚类 |
| **许可证** | MIT |
| **维护状态** | 已停止活跃维护（最后提交 7 个月前），仍接受 PR |

**核心能力：**
- 对**非结构化聊天/对话数据**做分析
- LLM 自动标记对话意图/行为
- Embedding 语义聚类 -> 递归分层聚类
- 自动提取**客户痛点、功能请求、行为模式**
- 隐私保护设计（不泄露 PII）
- 已知效果：支持量减少 40%，试转化率提升 18%

**B2B 客户跟进适用场景评价：**
本项目**专注于对话分析**，而非 CRM。它最适合对已有的大量客户对话（邮件、聊天记录）做**批量分析**，自动提炼出客户痛点、行为模式、功能需求。可以配合任何 CRM 使用 -- 将 CRM 中的历史对话/邮件导出给 Kura 分析，得到洞察用于改进跟进策略。不足是只支持**批处理**，不支持实时分析。MIT 协议，纯 Python，非常适合作为数据分析管道的一环。

---

## 综合对比总表

| 需求维度 | Twenty (44.8k) | BasaltCRM (较新) | DjangoCRM (540) | SalesGPT (2.5k) | Kura (440) |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 多渠道整合 (邮件+聊天) | 强 (邮件为主) | **强** (邮件+SMS+语音) | **强** (邮件营销) | **强** (邮件+SMS+IM+语音) | 分析层，不直接管理 |
| AI 分析/回复建议 | 弱 (需自接) | **强** (内置多模型) | 无 | **强** (AI 销售代理) | **强** (对话聚类分析) |
| 客户分类/优先级 | 有 (管道管理) | 有 (ICP 评分) | 有 (分群+阶段) | 有 (销售阶段感知) | 有 (自动聚类) |
| 本地部署 | Docker 一键 | Docker | Docker/Pip | Docker | Pip 安装 |
| Python API | GraphQL (通用) | TypeScript (Next.js) | **Django native** | **Python SDK** | **Python SDK** |
| Webhook/自动化 | **强** (Webhook + n8n) | 支持 | 支持 (Django signal) | **强** (LangChain) | 批处理，非实时 |

---

## 最终推荐策略

根据你的需求和搜索方向，我建议的组合思路如下：

1. **如果需要一个基础 CRM 做客户跟进管理** -- 首选 **Twenty CRM**。它拥有最大的社区、最现代的 UI、最完善的邮件集成和 API，Docker 一键部署，本地化部署极其方便。

2. **如果 AI 驱动是核心需求** -- 选择 **BasaltCRM**。它内置了 DeepSeek/Anthropic/OpenAI 多模型集成、AI 线索发现、AI 生成沟通内容、ICP 评分，是目前最接近"AI原生 B2B 跟进系统"的开源项目。

3. **如果 Python 生态是第一要求** -- 选择 **DjangoCRM**。它的 Django 技术栈意味着你能利用所有 Python 生态的 AI/数据分析库，邮件营销引擎也很完善。

4. **如果已有 CRM 但需要 AI 对话能力** -- 将 **SalesGPT** 作为 AI 销售代理层嵌入现有系统，处理自动化的客户跟进对话。

5. **如果需要客户对话分析（从历史数据中提炼洞察）** -- 使用 **Kura** 作为分析管道，输出客户痛点分类和行为模式报告。

Sources:
- [twentyhq/twenty](https://github.com/twentyhq/twenty)
- [BasaltHQ/crm-official](https://github.com/BasaltHQ/crm-official)
- [DjangoCRM/django-crm](https://github.com/DjangoCRM/django-crm)
- [filip-michalsky/SalesGPT](https://github.com/filip-michalsky/SalesGPT)
- [jxnl/kura](https://github.com/jxnl/kura)
- [awesome-open-source-crm](https://github.com/sneg55/awesome-open-source-crm)
